notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with proper asteroid splitting, UFO with aimed/random shots, hyperspace, heartbeat audio, extra lives, and high score persistence — minor issue is the high score display is missing from the HUD.

An exceptionally well-crafted implementation of Asteroids, featuring accurate mechanics like small/large UFO aiming behaviors, hyperspace risk, vector-style graphics, and even synthesized Web Audio API sound effects for thrust, firing, and the iconic heartbeat.

A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone with correct core mechanics and presentation, but it loses points for simplistic collision handling, one-shot firing instead of hold-to-fire, and a few gameplay/polish shortcomings.
